name: Merchant Guild
summary: A compact of traders, caravan owners, and market factors that regulates prices and protects trade privileges.
public_goal: Keep roads safe, markets supplied, and weights standardized.
private_goal: Control access to ruin-recovered goods before they enter public exchange.

relationships.notes: The guild wants quick trade; the archives want provenance and restrictions.

notes: The guild sponsors many guards indirectly through market fees.
